post.description: Launch PHASE 1 Experiment 2A: Stochastic Cognition Divergence

Launch PHASE 2 Experiment 1A: Cold-Start with Strong Baselines

Baselines: Random, Static, Heuristic mastery-only.
Metrics: Learning gain, Time-to-mastery, Regret, Accuracy.
Supports Contribution C (VALIDATION).

schema.title: Response Launch Phase2 Experiment 1A Experiments Phase2 1A Launch Post

post.description:
Launch Modern Cold Start Real System Experiment

Uses full architecture (UnifiedBrain, TrajectoryRecorder, Ownership enforcement).
Initializes learners with cold-start parameters (low confidence alpha/beta).
Tests full signal hierarchy under cold-start conditions (first 5-20 interactions).

Supports Contribution A (System Design CORE) - validates architecture under cold-start.

Baselines: If run_baselines=True, also runs Random, Static, and Heuristic mastery-only baselines for comparison.

Options:
- use_bandit_selection: Enable/disable Thompson sampling bandit for task selection
- enable_transfer_learning: Enable/disable K-12 concept DAG transfer learning

schema.title: Response Launch Phase2 Cold Start Real Experiments Phase2 Cold Start Real Launch Post

post.description:
Launch PHASE 2 Experiment 1B: Early Learning Curves

Performance over 5, 10, 20 interactions.
Metrics: Learning slope, Time-to-threshold, Regret reduction.
Supports Contribution C (VALIDATION).

schema.title: Response Launch Phase2 Experiment 1B Experiments Phase2 1B Launch Post

post.description:
Launch PHASE 3 Ablation 1: Signal Necessity

Remove uncertainty, ZPD, JT, Lyapunov, Bayesian, Kalman one at a time.
Metrics: Learning gain drop, stability degradation.
Supports Contribution A (System Design CORE).

schema.title: Response Launch Phase3 Ablation1 Experiments Phase3 Ablation1 Launch Post

post.description:
Launch PHASE 3 Ablation 2: Ensemble Contribution

Remove Lyapunov-only, Bayesian-only, Kalman-only vs full ensemble.
Metrics: Robustness, uncertainty calibration, performance drop.
Supports Contribution A (System Design CORE).

schema.title: Response Launch Phase3 Ablation2 Experiments Phase3 Ablation2 Launch Post

post.description:
Launch PHASE 4 Experiment 3A: Bandit Regret Analysis - Full System Integration

Full UnifiedBrain integration via CohortRunner for end-to-end experiment execution.

schema.title: Response Launch Phase4 Experiment 3A Experiments Phase4 3A Launch Post

post.description:
Launch PHASE 4 Experiment 4A: JT-Aware Policy Selection with Baselines

Baselines: Greedy mastery, Uncertainty reduction, ZPD-only, Random.
Metrics: JT trajectory, learning outcomes.
Supports Contribution B (SUPPORTING).

schema.title: Response Launch Phase4 Experiment 4A Experiments Phase4 4A Launch Post

post.description:
Launch PHASE 4 Experiment 4B: JT Correlation Testing

Does JT correlate with learning outcomes? Counterfactual analysis.
Supports Contribution B (SUPPORTING).

schema.title: Response Launch Phase4 Experiment 4B Experiments Phase4 4B Launch Post

post.description:
Launch PHASE 5 Experiment 5: Ensemble Convergence

Ensemble agreement over time, multi-learner vs single learners.
Metrics: Convergence rate, agreement metrics.
Supports Contribution A (System Design CORE).

schema.title: Response Launch Phase5 Experiment 5 Experiments Phase5 5 Launch Post

post.description:
Launch PHASE 5 Experiment 6: Learning Gain Dynamics with JT Evolution

JT trajectory, learner contributions, mastery delta, uncertainty reduction.
Metrics: Longitudinal stability.
Supports Contribution B (SUPPORTING).

schema.title: Response Launch Phase5 Experiment 6 Experiments Phase5 6 Launch Post

post.description:
Launch PHASE 6 Generalization Test

Different learners, difficulty distributions, domains, cross-concept transfer.
Metrics: Generalization score, performance consistency, transfer effectiveness.
Supports Contribution C (VALIDATION).

schema.title: Response Launch Phase6 Generalization Experiments Phase6 Generalization Launch Post

post.description:
Evaluate an experiment run with specified metrics and windows

POST /experiments/evaluate

Request:
{
  "experiment_run_id": "exp_001",
  "evaluation_windows": [5, 10, 20],
  "metrics": ["learning_gain", "regret", "stability"],
  "statistical_method": "frequentist|bayesian",
  "confidence_level": 0.95
}

schema.title: Response Evaluate Experiment Run Experiments Evaluate Post

post.description:
Compare two experiment runs with statistical testing

POST /experiments/compare

Request:
{
  "experiment_run_id_1": "exp_001",
  "experiment_run_id_2": "exp_002",
  "metric": "learning_gain",
  "evaluation_window": 20,
  "statistical_method": "frequentist|bayesian",
  "confidence_level": 0.95
}

schema.title: Response Compare Experiment Runs Experiments Compare Post

post.description:
Create a new pedagogical experiment.

This registers an experiment hypothesis for validation.
Experiments must be replay-compatible to support counterfactual analysis.

get.description:
List all experiments with optional filtering.

Query parameters:

- experiment_type: Filter by experiment type

schema.title: Response List Experiments Api Experiments  Get

get.description: Get experiment details by ID

put.description:
Update experiment lifecycle status.

Valid statuses: draft, active, paused, completed, archived

schema.title: Response Update Experiment Status Api Experiments  Experiment Id  Status Put

get.description:
Get current experiment and policy assignment for a user.

This uses deterministic hashing to ensure replay compatibility:
Same user_id + same experiment_seed → same assignment.

Query parameters:
- experiment_seed: Optional seed for deterministic assignment (e.g., date, experiment_id)

Get experiment lineage for replay and analysis.

Returns experiment metadata, assignment counts, and policy distribution.
Critical for validating replay determinism and cohort analysis.

schema.title: Response Get Experiment Lineage Api Experiments  Experiment Id  Lineage Get

post.description:
Record evaluation metric for experiment.

This is a simplified version - production would need proper metrics storage.
For now, metrics are logged for validation.

Body parameters:
- user_id: Learner identifier
- metric_name: Name of the metric (e.g., "mastery_gain", "pacing_stability")
- metric_value: Numeric metric value
- timestamp: Optional ISO timestamp (defaults to current time)

schema.title: Response Record Experiment Metric Api Experiments  Experiment Id  Metrics Post

post.description:
Simulate a ProjectionUpdated event for frontend testing

This endpoint broadcasts a test ProjectionUpdated event via WebSocket
to validate the frontend can receive and render projections correctly.

Simulate a complete runtime event sequence for timeline visualization

This endpoint broadcasts a sequence of events (TaskAttemptSubmitted → CognitionUpdated 
→ AdaptationGenerated → ProjectionUpdated) to validate the frontend timeline visualization.

Sequence:
1. TaskAttemptSubmitted (blue) - User submits answer
2. CognitionUpdated (green) - Runtime updates cognition
3. AdaptationGenerated (purple) - Adaptation engine generates pedagogical transition
4. ProjectionUpdated (orange) - Projection materialized and streamed

get.description:
Validate system works under cold start conditions.

Simulates fresh deployment scenario with no prior state.
Tests all critical initialization paths and semantic layer bootstrapping.
